# PERF-037 negative: result slice is preallocated with a capacity hint
lang: go
file: PERF-037-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func List(c *gin.Context) {
	rows := c.GetStringSlice("rows")
	out := make([]int, 0, len(rows))
	for _, v := range rows {
		out = append(out, len(v))
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"sizes": out})
}
